JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI /VERA MU, COURT REPORTER: PATTY HUBBLE. MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-28-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF YURY AND GITLYA BURYKOVSKY'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN TRIAL SETTING GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/26/04 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. NO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET. DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 7/12/04; DISCLOSURE OF EXPERTS OPEN UNTIL 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL; EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF IS 7/19/04. ORDER SIGNED.
